issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete and incorrect. Card text requires: (1) Look at 5 cards from top of deck, (2) Reveal up to 1 Baroque Works Event, (3) Add to hand, (4) Place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches by cost, missing the 5-card limit, type filter (Baroque Works Event), and deck arrangement step.
Filter should be by type 'Baroque Works' and card kind 'Event', not by cost. The maxCost parameter is not mentioned in card text.
Missing action to arrange remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order. Complete effect requires multiple sequential actions: search, reveal, add to hand, then arrange rest.
